action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Cold food item held above 41º F (smoked fish and reduced oxygen packaged foods above 38 ºF) except during necessary preparation.
Proper sanitization not provided for utensil ware washing operation.

action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Food Protection Certificate (FPC) not held by manager or supervisor of food operations.

action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Design, construction, materials used or maintenance of food contact surface improper. Surface not easily cleanable, sanitized and maintained.
Dishwashing and ware washing: Cleaning and sanitizing of tableware, including dishes, utensils, and equipment deficient.
